race.description: Mostyncopper James H B Carr Stakes (G3)
race.comment: PLAINTIFF (1) puts an unbeaten record on the line and not too sure where her ceiling is. Never on the track first-up when she sprinted over the top of them with a slick victory over 1200m in the G3 PJ Bell Stakes at this track. Trip suits with a much better set-up. The one to beat. KARINSKA (3) placed in the G1 Flight Stakes in the Spring and back in grade third-up. No match for Tempted with a plugging fifth in the G1 Surround over 1400m at this track. Kept fresh and given a recent 898m tick over trial. Gets the right run from the gate with J Mac up. Respect. BELLAZAINE (2) strips fitter third-up after bumping into a couple of smart types this prep. Knocked up late from the wide gate with a courageous fourth over 1200m in the G3 PJ Bell Stakes at this track. Should get the trip and prove hard to reel in. TOMATO TOASTIE (4) underrated filly who caught the eye first-up when third in the G3 PJ Bell Stakes. Fitter now and ready for the trip. BESIDE THE OCEAN (9) is worth thought.
